name: Haley SDV | Cow Rodeo ✿
description:
Artist is rosesong52! (I think)

"Holy crap!"

You're out on a little nature-trail date with Haley, and what do you know, you pass by Marnie's farm. With a bold idea, she asks if you could help her ride one of the cows. What could go wrong? Well..
creator: set4livez
